sentences.sentence: For many environmentalists, the world seems to be getting worse.
sentences.translation: 在许多环保主义者看来，世界似乎正在变得更糟。
difficult_points: For many environmentalists 表示观点来源。
seem to be getting 是“似乎正在变得”的系动词结构。

sentences.sentence: They have developed a hit-list of our main fears: that natural resources are running out; that the population is ever growing, leaving less and less to eat; that species are becoming extinct in vast numbers, and that the planet's air and water are becoming ever more polluted.
sentences.translation: 他们列出了我们最主要的担忧：自然资源正在耗尽；人口不断增长，能吃的东西越来越少；物种正在大量灭绝；地球的空气和水也变得越来越污染。

structure.text: have developed a hit-list of our main fears
that natural resources are running out
that the population is ever growing, leaving less and less to eat
that species are becoming extinct in vast numbers
and that the planet's air and water are becoming ever more polluted

difficult_points: 冒号后四个 that 从句并列列出 fears 的具体内容。
leaving less and less to eat 是结果分词短语，说明人口增长的后果。
run out 表示资源耗尽。

sentences.sentence: But a quick look at the facts shows a different picture.
sentences.translation: 但快速看看事实就会发现，情况并非如此。

structure.text: a quick look at the facts

difficult_points: a quick look 是动名词化名词短语作主语。
a different picture 是比喻说法，指不同的现实情况。

sentences.sentence: First, energy and other natural resources have become more abundant, not less so, since the book 'The Limits to Growth' was published in 1972 by a group of scientists.
sentences.translation: 首先，自从一群科学家于1972年出版《增长的极限》以来，能源和其他自然资源变得更加充足，而不是更加匮乏。

structure.text: have become more abundant, not less so
since the book 'The Limits to Growth' was published in 1972 by a group of scientists

difficult_points: have become 是现在完成时，since 从句说明变化起点。
not less so 中 so 代替 abundant，构成对比。
was published 是被动语态。

sentences.sentence: Second, more food is now produced per head of the world's population than at any time in history.
sentences.translation: 其次，如今世界人口人均生产的食物比历史上任何时期都多。

structure.text: per head of the world's population
than at any time in history

difficult_points: is produced 是被动语态，food 是生产的对象。
per head 表示“每人”，than 后省略了 produced 的重复部分。

sentences.sentence: Fewer people are starving.
sentences.translation: 挨饿的人变少了。
difficult_points: fewer 修饰可数名词 people，表示数量减少。
are starving 是现在进行时，描述正在挨饿的人。

sentences.sentence: Third, although species are indeed becoming extinct, only about 0.7% of them are expected to disappear in the next 50 years, not 25–50%, as has so often been predicted.
sentences.translation: 第三，虽然物种确实正在灭绝，但预计未来50年只有约0.7%的物种会消失，而不是经常被预测的25%至50%。

structure.text: although species are indeed becoming extinct
only about 0.7% of them are expected to disappear in the next 50 years
as has so often been predicted

difficult_points: although 引导让步从句，与主句的低比例形成对比。
are expected to disappear 是“预计会消失”的被动结构。
as has been predicted 指此前反复作出的预测。

sentences.sentence: And finally, most forms of environmental pollution either appear to have been exaggerated, or are transient – associated with the early phases of industrialisation and therefore best cured not by restricting economic growth, but by accelerating it.
sentences.translation: 最后，大多数形式的环境污染要么似乎被夸大了，要么只是暂时的——与工业化早期阶段有关，因此最好的解决办法不是限制经济增长，而是加速增长。

structure.text: either appear to have been exaggerated, or are transient
associated with the early phases of industrialisation
therefore best cured not by restricting economic growth, but by accelerating it

difficult_points: either...or...连接两种污染状态。
to have been exaggerated 是完成时被动不定式，表示此前已被夸大。
not by...but by...对比两种解决方式。

sentences.sentence: One form of pollution – the release of greenhouse gases that causes global warming – does appear to be a phenomenon that is going to extend well into our future, but its total impact is unlikely to pose a devastating problem.
sentences.translation: 有一种污染——释放导致全球变暖的温室气体——似乎确实会延续到很远的未来，但其总体影响不太可能造成灾难性问题。

structure.text: the release of greenhouse gases that causes global warming
does appear to be a phenomenon that is going to extend well into our future
but its total impact is unlikely to pose a devastating problem

difficult_points: 破折号内是对 pollution 的同位语解释。
does appear 用 does 强调“确实似乎”。
两个 that 定语从句分别修饰 greenhouse gases 和 phenomenon。

sentences.sentence: A bigger problem may well turn out to be an inappropriate response to it.
sentences.translation: 更大的问题很可能最终会是对它作出了不恰当的回应。

structure.text: may well turn out to be

difficult_points: may well 表示“很可能”。
turn out to be 表示“最终证明是”。
it 指前句的 global warming 或其影响。

sentences.sentence: Yet opinion polls suggest that many people nurture the belief that environmental standards are declining and four factors seem to cause this disjunction between perception and reality.
sentences.translation: 然而，民意调查显示，许多人抱有环境标准正在下降的看法，而四个因素似乎造成了这种认知与现实之间的脱节。

structure.text: suggest that many people nurture the belief that environmental standards are declining
and four factors seem to cause this disjunction between perception and reality

difficult_points: suggest 后有嵌套 that 从句，第二个 that 说明 belief 的内容。
and 连接民意调查结果与作者提出的因素。
disjunction 指认知与现实不一致。

sentences.sentence: One is the lopsidedness built into scientific research.
sentences.translation: 其中一个因素是科学研究中固有的不均衡。

structure.text: the lopsidedness built into scientific research

difficult_points: One 指前文提到的四个因素中的一个。
built into 修饰 lopsidedness，表示研究中固有的倾向。

sentences.sentence: Scientific funding goes mainly to areas with many problems.
sentences.translation: 科研资金主要流向问题较多的领域。
difficult_points: go to 在这里表示资金流向某领域。
with many problems 修饰 areas。

sentences.sentence: That may be wise policy, but it will also create an impression that many more potential problems exist than is the case.
sentences.translation: 这或许是明智的政策，但也会造成一种印象，仿佛潜在问题比实际情况多得多。

structure.text: but it will also create an impression that many more potential problems exist than is the case
that many more potential problems exist than is the case

difficult_points: That 指科研资金主要投向问题多的领域。
that 从句说明 impression 的内容。
than is the case 中 is the case 指实际情况，构成比较省略。

sentences.sentence: Secondly, environmental groups need to be noticed by the mass media.
sentences.translation: 其次，环保组织需要得到大众媒体的关注。
difficult_points: need to be noticed 是被动不定式，表示需要被媒体注意。
by 短语指出动作执行者。

sentences.sentence: They also need to keep the money rolling in.
sentences.translation: 他们也需要让资金源源不断地流入。
difficult_points: keep the money rolling in 是 keep+宾语+现在分词结构。
rolling in 是“源源不断涌入”的比喻表达。

sentences.sentence: Understandably, perhaps, they sometimes overstate their arguments.
sentences.translation: 或许可以理解的是，他们有时会夸大自己的论点。
difficult_points: Understandably, perhaps 是评论性插入语。
overstate 表示把论点说得超过实际程度。

sentences.sentence: In 1997, for example, the World Wide Fund for Nature issued a press release entitled: 'Two thirds of the world's forests lost forever'.
sentences.translation: 例如，1997年世界自然基金会发布了一份题为《世界三分之二的森林永远消失》的新闻稿。

structure.text: the World Wide Fund for Nature
issued a press release entitled: 'Two thirds of the world's forests lost forever'

difficult_points: entitled 是过去分词，修饰 press release。
引号内是新闻稿标题，省略了 are。

sentences.sentence: The truth turns out to be nearer 20%.
sentences.translation: 事实证明更接近20%。
difficult_points: turn out to be 表示最终事实证明是。
nearer 20% 与上句标题中的 two thirds 形成对比。

sentences.sentence: Though these groups are run overwhelmingly by selfless folk, they nevertheless share many of the characteristics of other lobby groups.
sentences.translation: 尽管这些组织绝大多数由无私的人运营，但它们仍然具有其他游说团体的许多特征。

structure.text: Though these groups are run overwhelmingly by selfless folk
they nevertheless share many of the characteristics of other lobby groups

difficult_points: Though 引导让步从句，are run 是被动语态。
nevertheless 与 though 呼应，表示“尽管如此仍然”。

sentences.sentence: That would matter less if people applied the same degree of scepticism to environmental lobbying as they do to lobby groups in other fields.
sentences.translation: 如果人们对环保游说也抱有与对其他领域游说团体相同程度的怀疑，这件事的影响就会小一些。

structure.text: if people applied the same degree of scepticism to environmental lobbying as they do to lobby groups in other fields
as they do to lobby groups in other fields

difficult_points: if 从句使用一般过去时，主句 would，构成与现在事实相反或假设的条件。
as they do 中 do 代替 apply the same degree of scepticism。

sentences.sentence: A trade organisation arguing for, say, weaker pollution controls is instantly seen as self-interested.
sentences.translation: 例如，一个主张放宽污染控制的行业组织会立即被视为出于自身利益。

structure.text: A trade organisation arguing for, say, weaker pollution controls
arguing for, say, weaker pollution controls

difficult_points: arguing 分词短语修饰 trade organisation。
say 是插入语，表示举例。
is seen as 是“被看作”的被动结构。

sentences.sentence: Yet a green organisation opposing such a weakening is seen as altruistic, even if an impartial view of the controls in question might suggest they are doing more harm than good.
sentences.translation: 然而，一个反对这种放宽的环保组织却被视为无私，即使公正看待有关控制措施可能会发现它们弊大于利。

structure.text: a green organisation opposing such a weakening
even if an impartial view of the controls in question might suggest they are doing more harm than good

difficult_points: opposing 分词短语修饰 green organisation。
even if 引导让步条件从句。
they 指 controls，more harm than good 表示弊大于利。

sentences.sentence: A third source of confusion is the attitude of the media.
sentences.translation: 第三个造成混淆的来源是媒体的态度。
difficult_points: 主语和表语都是名词短语，is 连接二者。
of the media 修饰 attitude。

sentences.sentence: People are clearly more curious about bad news than good.
sentences.translation: 人们显然对坏消息比对好消息更感兴趣。

structure.text: are clearly more curious about bad news than good

difficult_points: more...than...构成比较，good 后省略了 news。
curious about 表示对某事感兴趣或好奇。

sentences.sentence: Newspapers and broadcasters are there to provide what the public wants.
sentences.translation: 报纸和广播电视的存在就是提供公众想要的内容。

structure.text: to provide what the public wants

difficult_points: are there to do 表示存在的目的。
what the public wants 是 provide 的宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: That, however, can lead to significant distortions of perception.
sentences.translation: 然而，这可能导致认知出现严重偏差。
difficult_points: That 指媒体迎合公众对坏消息的兴趣。
lead to 后接结果名词，distortions of perception 指认知偏差。

sentences.sentence: An example was America's encounter with El Niño in 1997 and 1998.
sentences.translation: 美国在1997和1998年遭遇厄尔尼诺现象就是一个例子。

structure.text: America's encounter with El Niño in 1997 and 1998

difficult_points: America's encounter 是名词所有格结构，指美国所经历的事件。
with El Niño 说明 encounter 的对象。

sentences.sentence: This climatic phenomenon was accused of wrecking tourism, causing allergies, melting the ski slopes and causing 22 deaths.
sentences.translation: 这种气候现象被指责破坏旅游业、引发过敏、融化滑雪场，并造成22人死亡。

structure.text: was accused of wrecking tourism, causing allergies, melting the ski slopes and causing 22 deaths

difficult_points: be accused of 后接动名词，列举被指责的多个结果。
四个 -ing 结构并列。

sentences.sentence: However, according to an article in the Bulletin of the American Meteorological Society, the damage it did was estimated at US$4 billion but the benefits amounted to some US$19 billion.
sentences.translation: 然而，根据《美国气象学会公报》的一篇文章，它造成的损失估计为40亿美元，但带来的益处达到约190亿美元。

structure.text: However, according to an article in the Bulletin of the American Meteorological Society
the damage it did was estimated at US$4 billion
but the benefits amounted to some US$19 billion

difficult_points: it did 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 damage。
was estimated at 是被动表达，amounted to 表示总计达到。

sentences.sentence: These came from higher winter temperatures (which saved an estimated 850 lives, reduced heating costs and diminished spring floods caused by meltwaters).
sentences.translation: 这些益处来自较高的冬季气温（它估计挽救了850人的生命、降低了供暖成本，并减少了融雪水造成的春季洪水）。

structure.text: which saved an estimated 850 lives, reduced heating costs and diminished spring floods caused by meltwaters

difficult_points: These 指前句提到的 benefits。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，列举较高气温的三个好处。
caused by meltwaters 修饰 floods。

sentences.sentence: The fourth factor is poor individual perception.
sentences.translation: 第四个因素是个人认知能力较差。
difficult_points: is 连接主语和表语，说明第四个因素的内容。
individual perception 指个人对问题的理解和判断。

sentences.sentence: People worry that the endless rise in the amount of stuff everyone throws away will cause the world to run out of places to dispose of waste.
sentences.translation: 人们担心，每个人丢弃的物品数量不断增加，最终会使世界没有地方处理垃圾。

structure.text: that the endless rise in the amount of stuff everyone throws away will cause the world to run out of places to dispose of waste

difficult_points: that 从句是 worry 的宾语。
everyone throws away 修饰 stuff，省略了关系代词。
cause the world to run out of...是使役结构，to dispose of 修饰 places。

sentences.sentence: Yet, even if America's trash output continues to rise as it has done in the past, and even if the American population doubles by 2100, all the rubbish America produces through the entire 21st century will still take up only one-12,000th of the area of the entire United States.
sentences.translation: 然而，即使美国的垃圾产量继续像过去一样上升，即使美国人口到2100年翻倍，美国整个21世纪产生的所有垃圾占据的面积仍然只会达到美国国土面积的十二万分之一。

structure.text: even if America's trash output continues to rise as it has done in the past
and even if the American population doubles by 2100
all the rubbish America produces through the entire 21st century
America produces through the entire 21st century
will still take up only one-12,000th of the area of the entire United States

difficult_points: 两个 even if 从句并列，提出即使两种不利情况都发生的假设。
as it has done 中 has done 代替 continues to rise，避免重复。
America produces 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 rubbish。

sentences.sentence: So what of global warming?
sentences.translation: 那么，全球变暖又如何呢？
difficult_points: what of...是省略式问句，意为“……又怎么样”。
So 表示转入全球变暖这一主题。

sentences.sentence: As we know, carbon dioxide emissions are causing the planet to warm.
sentences.translation: 正如我们所知，二氧化碳排放正在导致地球变暖。

structure.text: are causing the planet to warm

difficult_points: As we know 是插入语。
cause somebody to do 表示导致某人或某物做某事。

sentences.sentence: The best estimates are that the temperatures will rise by 2–3℃ in this century, causing considerable problems, at a total cost of US$5,000 billion.
sentences.translation: 最可靠的估计是，本世纪气温将上升2至3摄氏度，造成相当大的问题，总成本达5万亿美元。

structure.text: that the temperatures will rise by 2–3℃ in this century
at a total cost of US$5,000 billion

difficult_points: that 从句是表语从句，说明 estimates 的具体内容。
causing 分词短语表示气温上升带来的结果。
at a total cost of 说明总成本。

sentences.sentence: Despite the intuition that something drastic needs to be done about such a costly problem, economic analyses clearly show it will be far more expensive to cut carbon dioxide emissions radically than to pay the costs of adaptation to the increased temperatures.
sentences.translation: 尽管直觉上觉得必须对如此昂贵的问题采取激烈措施，但经济分析清楚表明，大幅削减二氧化碳排放的成本将远高于支付适应气温升高的成本。

structure.text: Despite the intuition that something drastic needs to be done about such a costly problem
that something drastic needs to be done about such a costly problem
it will be far more expensive to cut carbon dioxide emissions radically than to pay the costs of adaptation to the increased temperatures

difficult_points: Despite 后接名词 intuition，that 从句说明直觉内容。
show 后接 it 作形式宾语，真正内容是不定式比较结构。
more expensive to cut...than to pay...比较两种成本。

sentences.sentence: A model by one of the main authors of the United Nations Climate Change Panel shows how an expected temperature increase of 2.1 degrees in 2100 would only be diminished to an increase of 1.9 degrees.
sentences.translation: 联合国气候变化小组一位主要作者建立的模型显示，预计2100年气温上升2.1度只能被降低到上升1.9度。

structure.text: A model by one of the main authors of the United Nations Climate Change Panel
how an expected temperature increase of 2.1 degrees in 2100 would only be diminished to an increase of 1.9 degrees

difficult_points: by 短语说明模型的提出者。
how 从句说明模型显示的具体结果。
would be diminished 是假设情境下的被动结构。

sentences.sentence: Or to put it another way, the temperature increase that the planet would have experienced in 2094 would be postponed to 2100.
sentences.translation: 换句话说，地球本来会在2094年经历的气温上升将被推迟到2100年。

structure.text: Or to put it another way
the temperature increase that the planet would have experienced in 2094
that the planet would have experienced in 2094

difficult_points: to put it another way 是换一种说法的插入语。
would have experienced 是虚拟语气的完成时，表示本来会发生的情况。
that 定语从句修饰 temperature increase。

sentences.sentence: So this does not prevent global warming, but merely buys the world six years.
sentences.translation: 所以，这并不能阻止全球变暖，只是为世界争取了六年时间。

structure.text: does not prevent global warming, but merely buys the world six years

difficult_points: does not...but...构成否定与转折对比。
buy the world six years 是比喻，表示争取时间。

sentences.sentence: Yet the cost of reducing carbon dioxide emissions, for the United States alone, will be higher than the cost of solving the world's single, most pressing health problem: providing universal access to clean drinking water and sanitation.
sentences.translation: 然而，仅对美国而言，减少二氧化碳排放的成本就会高于解决世界上最紧迫的单一健康问题——让所有人都能获得清洁饮用水和卫生设施的成本。

structure.text: the cost of reducing carbon dioxide emissions
will be higher than the cost of solving the world's single, most pressing health problem
providing universal access to clean drinking water and sanitation

difficult_points: reducing 和 solving 都是动名词作 of 的宾语。
for the United States alone 是插入语，限定比较范围。
冒号后解释 health problem 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: Such measures would avoid 2 million deaths every year, and prevent half a billion people from becoming seriously ill.
sentences.translation: 这样的措施每年可以避免200万人死亡，并防止5亿人患上重病。

structure.text: would avoid 2 million deaths every year, and prevent half a billion people from becoming seriously ill

difficult_points: Such measures 指前句提到的供水和卫生措施。
prevent somebody from doing 是固定结构。

sentences.sentence: It is crucial that we look at the facts if we want to make the best possible decisions for the future.
sentences.translation: 如果我们想为未来作出尽可能好的决定，审视事实至关重要。

structure.text: that we look at the facts
if we want to make the best possible decisions for the future

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语。
if 从句说明作出好决定的条件。

sentences.sentence: It may be costly to be overly optimistic – but more costly still to be too pessimistic.
sentences.translation: 过度乐观可能代价高昂——但过于悲观的代价还要更高。

structure.text: It may be costly to be overly optimistic
but more costly still to be too pessimistic

difficult_points: 两个 it 都是形式主语，真正内容是不定式。
more costly still 是省略结构，完整为 it is more costly still。
